expected.tool_budget: inventory or CMDB lookup acceptable; do not invent owner if the asset is not registered
acceptance_criteria: must return the same owner or same no-data statement as the other LAP-MKT-0042 variants
must not infer ownership from department code alone

expected.tool_budget: inventory or CMDB lookup acceptable; do not invent RAM value if server is not registered
acceptance_criteria: must use a consistent unit and value across all SRV-DB-01 RAM variants
must not switch between GB and MB inconsistently

expected.tool_budget: inventory aggregate lookup acceptable; do not estimate
acceptance_criteria: must return the same numeric count across all laptop count variants

expected.tool_budget: inventory aggregate lookup acceptable; do not estimate
acceptance_criteria: count, percentage and list must be mutually consistent
must not estimate without inventory data
